### exit 0
### stdout
### stderr
### tree
dir  home
dir  stow
dir  stow/one
file stow/one/f 0644 6b86b273ff34fce19d6b804eff5a3f5747ada4eaa22f1d49c01e52ddb7875b4b
dir  stow/two
file stow/two/f 0644 d4735e3a265e16eee03f59718b9b5d03019c07d8b6c51f90da3a666eec13ab35
dir  target
link target/f -> ../stow/one/f
### end
